func getRequestProtocol(req *http.Request) string {
	switch {
	case isWebsocketRequest(req):
		return protoWebsocket
	case isSSERequest(req):
		return protoSSE
	case isGRPCWebRequest(req):
		return protoGRPCWeb
	case isGRPCRequest(req):
		return protoGRPC
	default:
		return protoHTTP
	}
}
